scripts.dev:api: if [ -x apps/server/.venv/bin/python ]; then apps/server/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/server --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; else python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/server --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; fi
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:web
